member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPAuthenticationsWebApiClient
member.summary: Client for the LDAP Web API Authentications controller.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPAuthenticationsWebApiClient.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: LDAP Web Api base URL.
LDAP Server Profile Id.
Whether or not the global catalog of the LDAP server will be used; otherwise the local catalog of the LDAP server will be used.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPAuthenticationsWebApiClient.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Net.Http.HttpClientHandler,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a custom HttpClientHandler.
member.param: LDAP Web Api base URL.
LDAP Server Profile Id.
Whether or not the global catalog of the LDAP server will be used; otherwise the local catalog of the LDAP server will be used.
The custom HttpClientHandler to handle HTTP requests.
true if the inner handler should be disposed of by Dispose(), false if you intend to reuse the inner handler.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPAuthenticationsWebApiClient.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,Bitai.WebApi.Client.WebApiClientCredential)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with Identity Server credentials.
member.param: LDAP Web Api base URL.
LDAP Server Profile Id.
Whether or not the global catalog of the LDAP server will be used; otherwise the local catalog of the LDAP server will be used.
Client credentials to request an access token from the Identity Server. This access token will be sent in the HTTP authorization header as Bearer Token.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPAuthenticationsWebApiClient.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,Bitai.WebApi.Client.WebApiClientCredential,System.Net.Http.HttpClientHandler,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with Identity Server credentials and a custom HttpClientHandler.
member.param: LDAP Web Api base URL.
LDAP Server Profile Id.
Whether or not the global catalog of the LDAP server will be used; otherwise the local catalog of the LDAP server will be used.
Client credentials to request an access token from the Identity Server. This access token will be sent in the HTTP authorization header as Bearer Token.
The custom HttpClientHandler to handle HTTP requests.
true if the inner handler should be disposed of by Dispose(), false if you intend to reuse the inner handler.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPAuthenticationsWebApiClient.AuthenticateAsync(Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.LDAPDomainAccountCredential,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a POST request to authenticate a domain account credential.
member.param: Account credentials or network credentials.
Custom tag to identify the request and mark the data returned in the response.
Whether or not to request and / or assign the access token in the authorization HTTP header.
See .
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the domain account authentication result.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPAuthenticationsWebApiClient.AuthenticateWithoutUserLookupAsync(Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.LDAPDomainAccountCredential,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a POST request to authenticate a domain account credential without loading user details.
member.param: Account credentials or network credentials.
Custom tag to identify the request and mark the data returned in the response.
Whether or not to request and / or assign the access token in the authorization HTTP header.
See .
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the domain account authentication result.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPCatalogTypesWebApiClient
member.summary: Client for the LDAP Web API CatalogTypes controller.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: LDAP Web Api base URL.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPCatalogTypesWebApiClient.#ctor(System.String,System.Net.Http.HttpClientHandler,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a custom HttpClientHandler.
member.param: LDAP Web Api base URL.
The custom HttpClientHandler to handle HTTP requests.
true if the inner handler should be disposed of by Dispose(), false if you intend to reuse the inner handler.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with Identity Server credentials.
member.param: LDAP Web Api base URL.
Client credentials to request an access token from the Identity Server. This access token will be sent in the HTTP authorization header as Bearer Token.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPCatalogTypesWebApiClient.#ctor(System.String,Bitai.WebApi.Client.WebApiClientCredential,System.Net.Http.HttpClientHandler,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with Identity Server credentials and a custom HttpClientHandler.
member.param: LDAP Web Api base URL.
Client credentials to request an access token from the Identity Server. This access token will be sent in the HTTP authorization header as Bearer Token.
The custom HttpClientHandler to handle HTTP requests.
true if the inner handler should be disposed of by Dispose(), false if you intend to reuse the inner handler.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPCatalogTypesWebApiClient.GetAllAsync(System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a GET request to retrieve available LDAP catalog types.
member.param: Whether or not to request and / or assign the access token in the authorization HTTP header.
See .
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the configured LDAP catalog types.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPDirectoryWebApiClient

LDAP Server Profile Id.
Whether or not the global catalog of the LDAP server will be used; otherwise the local catalog of the LDAP server will be used.
The custom HttpClientHandler to handle HTTP requests.
true if the inner handler should be disposed of by Dispose(), false if you intend to reuse the inner handler.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with Identity Server credentials.
member.param: LDAP Web Api base URL.
LDAP Server Profile Id.
Whether or not the global catalog of the LDAP server will be used; otherwise the local catalog of the LDAP server will be used.
Client credentials to request an access token from the Identity Server. This access token will be sent in the HTTP authorization header as Bearer Token.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with Identity Server credentials and a custom HttpClientHandler.
member.param: LDAP Web Api base URL.
LDAP Server Profile Id.
Whether or not the global catalog of the LDAP server will be used; otherwise the local catalog of the LDAP server will be used.
Client credentials to request an access token from the Identity Server. This access token will be sent in the HTTP authorization header as Bearer Token.
The custom HttpClientHandler to handle HTTP requests.
true if the inner handler should be disposed of by Dispose(), false if you intend to reuse the inner handler.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPDirectoryWebApiClient.SearchByIdentifierAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sends a GET request to search one directory entry by identifier.
member.param: User account identifier.
Custom tag to identify the request and mark the data returned in the response.
Whether or not to request and / or assign the access token in the authorization HTTP header.
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the search result.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPDirectoryWebApiClient.SearchByIdentifierAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.RequiredEntryAttributes},System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sends a GET request to search one directory entry by identifier and select required attributes.
member.param: User account identifier.
Set of LDAP attributes that the search result should contain. See .
Custom tag to identify the request and mark the data returned in the response.
Whether or not to request and / or assign the access token in the authorization HTTP header.
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the search result.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPDirectoryWebApiClient.SearchByIdentifierAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.EntryAttribute},System.Nullable{Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.RequiredEntryAttributes},System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a GET request to search one directory entry by identifier and identifier attribute.
member.param: User account identifier.
Type of attribute that serves as an identifier for the user account. See .
Set of LDAP attributes that the search result should contain. See .
Custom tag to identify the request and mark the data returned in the response.
Whether or not to request and / or assign the access token in the authorization HTTP header.
See .
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the search result.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPDirectoryWebApiClient.SearchByFiltersAsync(Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.EntryAttribute,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sends a GET request to search directory entries using one filter.
member.param: that will condition the search according to the .
The value that must be compared with the in order to satisfy the search condition.
Custom tag to identify the request and mark the data returned in the response.
Whether or not to request and / or assign the access token in the authorization HTTP header.
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the search result.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPDirectoryWebApiClient.SearchByFiltersAsync(Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.EntryAttribute,System.String,System.Nullable{Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.RequiredEntryAttributes},System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a GET request to search directory entries using one filter and a required attribute projection.
member.param: that will condition the search according to the .
The value that must be compared with the in order to satisfy the search condition.
The attributes that we want to obtain for each LDAP entry that was obtained as result of the search.
Custom tag to identify the request and mark the data returned in the response.
Whether or not to request and / or assign the access token in the authorization HTTP header.
See .
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the search result.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPDirectoryWebApiClient.SearchByFiltersAsync(Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.EntryAttribute,System.String,System.Nullable{Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.EntryAttribute},System.String,System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a GET request to search directory entries using up to two filters.
member.param: that will condition the search according to the .
The value that must be compared with the in order to satisfy the search condition.
Second that will condition the search according to the .
The value that must be compared with the in order to satisfy the search condition.
Whether it is combined in a conjunction or not the search filters.
Custom tag to identify the request and mark the data returned in the response.
Whether or not to request and / or assign the access token in the authorization HTTP header.
See .
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the search result.

member.summary: Sends a GET request to search directory entries using up to two filters and a required attribute projection.
member.param: that will condition the search according to the .
The value that must be compared with the in order to satisfy the search condition.
Second that will condition the search according to the .
The value that must be compared with the in order to satisfy the search condition.
Whether it is combined in a conjunction or not the search filters.
The attributes that we want to obtain for each LDAP entry that was obtained as result of the search.
Custom tag to identify the request and mark the data returned in the response.
Whether or not to request and / or assign the access token in the authorization HTTP header.
See .
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the search result.

LDAP Server Profile Id.
Whether or not the global catalog of the LDAP server will be used; otherwise the local catalog of the LDAP server will be used.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPGroupsDirectoryWebApiClient.SearchByIdentifierAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.EntryAttribute},System.Nullable{Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.RequiredEntryAttributes},System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a GET request to search one LDAP group entry by identifier.
member.param: The value that must be compared with the in order to satisfy the search condition.
that identifies an LDAP entry.
The attributes that we want to obtain from the LDAP entry as a result of the search.
Label that will identify the results of the operation.
Whether or not to request and / or assign the access token in the authorization HTTP header.
See .
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the group search result.

member.summary: Sends a GET request to search LDAP group entries using one or two filters.
member.param: that will condition the search according to the .
The value that must be compared with the in order to satisfy the search condition.
Second that will condition the search according to the .
The value that must be compared with the in order to satisfy the search condition.
Whether it is combined in a conjunction or not the search filters.
The attributes that we want to obtain for each LDAP entry that was obtained as result of the search.
Custom tag to identify the request and mark the data returned in the response.
Whether or not to request and / or assign the access token in the authorization HTTP header.
See .
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the group search result.

See .
member.returns: An HTTP response containing all LDAP server profiles.

The custom HttpClientHandler to handle HTTP requests.
true if the inner handler should be disposed of by Dispose(), false if you intend to reuse the inner handler.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPUserDirectoryWebApiClient.SearchFilteringByAsync(System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Search for user accounts using the sAMAccountName attribute.
member.param: The sAMAccountName value to filter by.
Whether or not to add the security "Bearer Token" to the HTTP request header.
Custom tag to identify the request and mark the data returned in the response.
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the user search result.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPUserDirectoryWebApiClient.SearchFilteringByAsync(System.String,Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.RequiredEntryAttributes,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Search for user accounts using the sAMAccountName attribute and specifying the required attributes.
member.param: The sAMAccountName value to filter by.
Set of LDAP attributes that the search result should contain.
Whether or not to add the security "Bearer Token" to the HTTP request header.
Custom tag to identify the request and mark the data returned in the response.
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the user search result.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPUserDirectoryWebApiClient.SearchFilteringByAsync(Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.EntryAttribute,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Search for user accounts using a specific LDAP attribute filter.
member.param: LDAP attribute type to filter by.
Value that will be used to filter the LDAP attribute assigned in the filterAttribute parameter.
Whether or not to add the security "Bearer Token" to the HTTP request header.
Custom tag to identify the request and mark the data returned in the response.
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the user search result.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPUserDirectoryWebApiClient.SearchFilteringByAsync(Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.EntryAttribute,System.String,Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.RequiredEntryAttributes,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Search for user accounts using a specific LDAP attribute filter and specifying the required attributes.
member.param: LDAP attribute type to filter by.
Value that will be used to filter the LDAP attribute assigned in the filterAttribute parameter.
Set of LDAP attributes that the search result should contain.
Whether or not to add the security "Bearer Token" to the HTTP request header.
Custom tag to identify the request and mark the data returned in the response.
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the user search result.

member.summary: Search for one or more user accounts using search filters.
member.param: LDAP attribute type that should contain (fully or partially) the value of the parameter.
Value that will be used to filter the LDAP attribute assigned in the parameter.
Optional LDAP attribute type that should contain (fully or partially) the value of the parameter.
Optional value that will be used to filter the LDAP attribute assigned in the parameter.
Whether the first filter is combined inclusively or exclusively with the second filter.
Set of LDAP attributes that the search result should contain.
Custom tag to identify the request and mark the data returned in the response.
Whether or not to add the security "Bearer Token" to the HTTP request header.
See .
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the user search result.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPUserDirectoryWebApiClient.CreateMsADUserAccountAsync(Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.LDAPMsADUserAccount,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates an MS AD user account.
member.param: Data for the new user account. See .
Custom tag to identify the request and mark the data returned in the response.
Whether or not to request and / or assign the access token in the authorization HTTP header.
See .
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the account creation result.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPUserDirectoryWebApiClient.SetMsADUserAccountPasswordAsync(Bitai.LDAPWebApi.DTO.LDAPCredential,System.Nullable{Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.EntryAttribute},System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sets the password for an MS AD user account.
member.param: The that contains the password to be assigned to the user account.
The LDAP type to which the (route) parameter relates.
Custom tag to identify the request and mark the data returned in the response.
Whether or not to request and / or assign the access token in the authorization HTTP header.
See .
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the password update result.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPUserDirectoryWebApiClient.DisableMsADUserAccountAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.EntryAttribute},System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Disables an MS AD user account.
member.param: User account identifier value.
LDAP attribute used as the identifier route value.
Custom tag to identify the request and mark the data returned in the response.
Whether or not to request and / or assign the access token in the authorization HTTP header.
See .
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the disable operation result.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPUserDirectoryWebApiClient.RemoveMsADUserAccountAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.EntryAttribute},System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes an MS AD user account.
member.param: User account identifier value.
LDAP attribute used as the identifier route value.
Custom tag to identify the request and mark the data returned in the response.
Whether or not to request and / or assign the access token in the authorization HTTP header.
See .
member.returns: An HTTP response containing the remove operation result.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient
member.summary: Provides shared configuration and helper utilities for LDAP Web API clients.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient.LDAPServerProfile
member.summary: Gets or sets the LDAP server profile identifier defined in the LDAP Web API configuration.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient.UseLDAPServerGlobalCatalog
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether requests should target the server global catalog instead of the local catalog.

member.name: P:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient.LDAPServerCatalogTypes
member.summary: Gets helper methods for resolving LDAP catalog type route values.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: LDAP Web Api base URL.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient.#ctor(System.String,System.Net.Http.HttpClientHandler,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a custom HttpClientHandler.
member.param: LDAP Web Api base URL.
The custom HttpClientHandler to handle HTTP requests.
true if the inner handler should be disposed of by Dispose(), false if you intend to reuse the inner handler.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient.#ctor(System.String,Bitai.WebApi.Client.WebApiClientCredential)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with Identity Server credentials.
member.param: LDAP Web Api base URL.
Client credentials to request an access token from the Identity Server.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient.#ctor(System.String,Bitai.WebApi.Client.WebApiClientCredential,System.Net.Http.HttpClientHandler,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with Identity Server credentials and a custom HttpClientHandler.
member.param: LDAP Web Api base URL.
Client credentials to request an access token from the Identity Server.
The custom HttpClientHandler to handle HTTP requests.
true if the inner handler should be disposed of by Dispose(), false if you intend to reuse the inner handler.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with LDAP server profile routing settings.
member.param: LDAP Web Api base URL.
LDAP Server Profile Id.
Whether the global catalog or the local catalog will be used.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,Bitai.WebApi.Client.WebApiClientCredential)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with LDAP server profile routing settings and Identity Server credentials.
member.param: LDAP Web Api base URL.
LDAP Server Profile Id.
Whether the global catalog or the local catalog will be used.
Security parameters to obtain an access token from the Identity Server.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Net.Http.HttpClientHandler,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with server configuration details and a custom HttpClientHandler.
member.param: LDAP Web Api base URL.
LDAP Server Profile Id.
Whether or not the global catalog of the LDAP server will be used; otherwise the local catalog of the LDAP server will be used.
The custom HttpClientHandler to handle HTTP requests.
true if the inner handler should be disposed of by Dispose(), false if you intend to reuse the inner handler.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,Bitai.WebApi.Client.WebApiClientCredential,System.Net.Http.HttpClientHandler,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with server configuration details, Identity Server credentials, and a custom HttpClientHandler.
member.param: LDAP Web Api base URL.
LDAP Server Profile Id.
Whether or not the global catalog of the LDAP server will be used; otherwise the local catalog of the LDAP server will be used.
Client credentials to request an access token from the Identity Server.
The custom HttpClientHandler to handle HTTP requests.
true if the inner handler should be disposed of by Dispose(), false if you intend to reuse the inner handler.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient.GetOptionalEntryAttributeName(System.Nullable{Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.EntryAttribute})
member.summary: Gets the query-string value for an optional parameter.
member.param: Nullable .
member.returns: The attribute name when specified; otherwise an empty string.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient.GetOptionalRequiredEntryAttributesName(System.Nullable{Bitai.LDAPHelper.DTO.RequiredEntryAttributes})
member.summary: Gets the query-string value for an optional parameter.
member.param: Nullable .
member.returns: The attribute set value when specified; otherwise an empty string.

member.name: M:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient.GetOptionalBooleanValue(System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Gets the query-string value for an optional Boolean parameter.
member.param: Nullable Boolean value.
member.returns: The Boolean value as text when specified; otherwise an empty string.

member.name: T:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient.ControllerNames
member.summary: Exposes constant route segment names for LDAP Web API controllers.

member.name: F:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient.ControllerNames.ServerProfilesController
member.summary: Server Profiles controller name.

member.name: F:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient.ControllerNames.CatalogTypesController
member.summary: Catalog Types controller name.

member.name: F:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient.ControllerNames.AuthenticationsController
member.summary: Authentications controller name

member.name: F:Bitai.LDAPWebApi.Clients.LDAPWebApiBaseClient.ControllerNames.DirectoryController
member.summary: Directory controller name.
